item.title: NLP Series [Part 3] · Word2Vec-SkipGram-SubWord
item.description: Most of the steps are similar to our notebook on Word2Vec Skip-Gram model. The key change is that we will train a model on subword tokens so that we can generate embeddings for out of vocab words and have some tolerance for typos. The first step for using any kind of NLP pipeline is to vectorize the text. Traditionally, we used to do this using one-hot representation of vectors. This had various downsides like:
